titleStmt.title: SII 39.123: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 123. (A.R. No. 123 of 1916.) ETTIYĀTTALI, ARANTANGI TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT. AGASTYĒŚVARA TEMPLE-ON THE SAME WALL •••••••••• ŚAKA 1364 (1442 A.D.)

summary.p: This inscription records the gift of the kāṇiyāṭchi of some land to a Taṇṇāyaka-Toṇḍaimānār by Aḻagiyamaṇavāḷaperumāḷ Toṇḍaimāṉār of Aṟantāngi. Nirambavaḻiyāṉ Kāliṅgarāyar is figured as signatory in the inscription.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
cakāttam 1000 3 100 6 10 4
mel cellā niṉṟa tuntumi varuṣam puraṭṭāti ø2 10 9 § Aṟintāṅki Aracu Uṭaiyār Aḻakiya maṇavāḷap perumāḷ toṇṭaimāṉār daṇṇāyaka
toṇṭaimāṉāṟku vaṭaveḷḷāṟāṉa cuntarapāṇṭiya vaḷaṉāṭṭu māṅkuṭi veḷḷaāḻaril piḷḷaiyār piṟavikku nallār pakkal koṇṭa marutañce
rūpāy 10 1 Ivvūr tirucciṟṟampala muṭaiyār Āvuṭaiyār pakkal koṇṭa Uṭaiyāṉ vayakakal rūpāy Orumā Āka rūpāy ma Orumā Iṉṉila Iraṇṭu māvaraikkum yiṟaiyi
liyāka kaḻittu yiṉṉilattukku veṭṭimuṭṭi viṉiyoka mākkalam Eppeṟpaṭṭa camutta piṟāttikaḷukku ṉāyiṉār tiruvakatticuramuṭaiyāṟku māttāl
Añcu marakkāl poṉ kuṭukka kaṟpittu kuṭutta 8 yiṉṉilam teṇṇāyakka toṇṭamāṉār cantirātittavarai kāṇiyāṭci Āka paṟṟi Āḷakaṭavarākavum Itukku
Akitam paṇṇiṉavaṉ gaṅkaikaraiyil brāhmaṇaraiyum kapilaiyaiyum koṉṟa pāvam peṟakkaṭavārākavum Ippaṭi Uṭaiyavar Aruḷac ceyaṟppaṭikku
nirampa vaḻakiyāṉ kāliṅkarāyaṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 39.123 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
